reference: Hello, Doctor. I was involved in a car accident in which my vehicle ran in reverse over my left arm, causing swelling and bruising all over my arm. Now, when I try to lay my arm down on something, there is a lot of pain in the elbow area and around the top of the elbow. The doctor says there is nothing broken. I am just wondering what I should do. It is warm to the touch.
